title: Continuous Internal Evaluation Process on a Blockchain
description: This flowchart illustrates how a blockchain automates and secures the process of continuous internal evaluation, such as tracking student performance or project milestones, through a series of immutable and transparent steps.
relationships: The Educator defines evaluation criteria which are coded into a Smart Contract
The Student submits work or evidence (e.g., project code, test scores) as a transaction
The transaction is validated by network nodes and added to the Distributed Ledger
The Smart Contract automatically executes, assessing the submission against the criteria
The resulting Automated Assessment & Grade is recorded immutably on the ledger
Stakeholders (e.g., students, institutions) can view the transparent and verified record
